title: Task frontmatter schema
description: Schema for TASK artifacts — implementation units for AI agents

implements.description: Wiki link to the parent functional requirement (FR)

part_of_story.description: Wiki link to the parent User Story (source of acceptance criteria)

acceptance_criteria_subset.description: List of AC IDs from the parent User Story (e.g., AC-1, AC-2)

target_files.description: Relative file paths from repo root
